SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Interface LogicalPlan.Ddl

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, LogicalPlan
All Known Implementing Classes:
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalog, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateExternalTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateFunction, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateIndex, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateMemoryTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateView, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropFunction, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropView
Enclosing interface:
LogicalPlan
public static sealed interface LogicalPlan.Ddl extends LogicalPlan permits LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateExternalTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateMemoryTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateView, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalog, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateIndex, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropTable, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropView, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropCatalogSchema, LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateFunction, LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropFunction
Data Definition Language operations (CREATE, DROP).

This is a sealed sub-interface with variants for each DDL operation type.

See Also:
